docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY MOORE, LEBORIA VAUGHN, ROSA RENETIA AS TO DEFENDANT TALENT DEVELOPMENT & SHOWCASE CENTER MCCOY, CONSTANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
